name: 阅读理解 · 第三辑（主旨 / 推断 / 猜词）
desc: 中考高阶题型专练：主旨大意、推理判断、结合上下文猜词义——不是只找原句，要读懂。2 篇短文共 7 题，均带原文面板。免费档。

m4.q: What is the passage mainly about?
ops: How a kind teacher changed a student
How to pass a math test
m4.why: 主旨题：全文讲 Ms. Lee 的鼓励改变了 Kevin，A 概括最全。
m4.passage: Kevin was not good at math. He often failed the tests. One day his teacher, Ms. Lee, did not give him a low mark. Instead, she wrote, "You tried harder this time. Keep going!" Kevin was surprised. That night he studied for two hours. Little by little, his marks went up. Years later, Kevin became a math teacher. He always remembers Ms. Lee's words.

m4.q: What can we learn about Ms. Lee?
m4.why: 推断题：她写鼓励的话而非打低分，说明她 encourages（鼓励）学生。
m4.passage: Kevin was not good at math. He often failed the tests. One day his teacher, Ms. Lee, did not give him a low mark. Instead, she wrote, "You tried harder this time. Keep going!" Kevin was surprised. That night he studied for two hours. Little by little, his marks went up. Years later, Kevin became a math teacher. He always remembers Ms. Lee's words.

m4.q: The words "Little by little" in the passage mean ___.
m4.why: 猜词题：marks went up 是逐渐的过程，little by little = 一点一点地。
m4.passage: Kevin was not good at math. He often failed the tests. One day his teacher, Ms. Lee, did not give him a low mark. Instead, she wrote, "You tried harder this time. Keep going!" Kevin was surprised. That night he studied for two hours. Little by little, his marks went up. Years later, Kevin became a math teacher. He always remembers Ms. Lee's words.

m4.q: What did Kevin become years later?
m4.why: 细节题：Years later, Kevin became a math teacher。
m4.passage: Kevin was not good at math. He often failed the tests. One day his teacher, Ms. Lee, did not give him a low mark. Instead, she wrote, "You tried harder this time. Keep going!" Kevin was surprised. That night he studied for two hours. Little by little, his marks went up. Years later, Kevin became a math teacher. He always remembers Ms. Lee's words.

m4.q: What is the writer mainly trying to do?
m4.why: 主旨题：全文给考前建议（two tips…Stay calm）。
m4.passage: Many students feel nervous before an exam. Here are two tips. First, sleep well the night before; a tired brain works slowly. Second, eat a good breakfast. Do not try to learn everything at the last minute — it only makes you more worried. Stay calm, and trust the work you have already done.

m4.q: Why does the writer say you should sleep well?
ops: Because a tired brain works slowly
m4.why: 细节题：a tired brain works slowly（累的大脑运转慢）。
m4.passage: Many students feel nervous before an exam. Here are two tips. First, sleep well the night before; a tired brain works slowly. Second, eat a good breakfast. Do not try to learn everything at the last minute — it only makes you more worried. Stay calm, and trust the work you have already done.

m4.q: What does the writer think of last-minute learning?
ops: It saves a lot of time
m4.why: 推断题：it only makes you more worried（临时抱佛脚只会更焦虑）。
m4.passage: Many students feel nervous before an exam. Here are two tips. First, sleep well the night before; a tired brain works slowly. Second, eat a good breakfast. Do not try to learn everything at the last minute — it only makes you more worried. Stay calm, and trust the work you have already done.
